---------------A: Plain Monte Carlo Integration---------------

# Circle
# x^2 + y^2 <= 1
# Exact value: 3.14159
# N Value Error ActualError
100 3.12 0.165699 0.0215927
1000 3.192 0.0507852 0.0504073
10000 3.1352 0.0164661 0.00639265
100000 3.13512 0.00520721 0.00647265
1000000 3.14316 0.0016411 0.00156335
10000000 3.14135 0.000519357 0.000239854

# Gaussian
# exp(-x^2 - y^2)
# Exact value: 0.557746
# N Value Error ActualError
100 0.561154 0.0220165 0.00340769
1000 0.566807 0.00672172 0.00906079
10000 0.554189 0.00215605 0.00355719
100000 0.556416 0.00068221 0.00133066
1000000 0.557717 0.000216274 2.97253e-05
10000000 0.557791 6.83193e-05 4.48339e-05

# Ellipsoid
# x^2/a^2 + y^2/b^2 + z^2/c^2 <= 1
# Exact value: 25.1327
# N Value Error ActualError
100 27.36 2.37636 2.22726
1000 25.296 0.757839 0.163259
10000 24.96 0.239808 0.172741
100000 25.1405 0.0758089 0.00773877
1000000 25.1388 0.023973 0.00601077
10000000 25.1308 0.00758104 0.00189483

---------------B: Quasi-Random Sequences---------------

# N LCG STD QMC
100 0.0365587 0.0256374 0.0102469
1000 0.00836622 0.00466628 0.00118693
10000 0.00155562 0.00374244 0.000186485
100000 0.000558983 0.000349044 2.19239e-05
1000000 5.87787e-05 5.00561e-05 2.28182e-06
10000000 3.33921e-05 5.22676e-05 2.99704e-07

---------------C: Stratified Sampling---------------

# N PlainMC Stratified
100 0.0150327 0.019071
1000 0.00313103 0.00700717
10000 5.37264e-06 0.00121037
100000 0.000411417 0.000161705
1000000 0.000219453 1.19044e-05
10000000 7.87774e-05 3.12286e-07
